name: Omniscient Verity
descriptionTemplate: While in hand, if the card at the top of the Draw Pile is a Command Card, become a copy of it. Revert after playing and gain [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus.

patch.descriptionTemplate: While in hand, if the top card of the Draw Pile is a Command Card, transform into its Copy with Arithmetica Cost reduced by 1. After playing, revert and gain [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus.
